seo.title: Firebase Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete Firebase analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in Backend-as-a-Service.

lock_in.data_portability: firebaseusers2json for auth, but DB andand withon
lock_in.explanation: High — deep binding to Google ecosystem, Firestore/RTDB proprietary, requires re-architecting backend

when_to_use: Mobile app MVP with tight deadline
Need auth + DB + hosting + analytics in one platform
when_not_to_use: Need SQL database or complex queries — use Supabase
Want to avoid vendor lock-in — Firebase is HIGH lock-in

migration_cheatsheet.data_you_keep: firebaseusers2json for auth, but DB andand withon
migration_cheatsheet.risk_notes: High — deep binding to Google ecosystem, Firestore/RTDB proprietary, requires re-architecting backend
migration_cheatsheet.tip: Plan 2-4 weeks minimum. Consider running parallel during migration

review.verdict: Best for mobile app mvp with tight deadline. Firebase offers Pay-as-you-go (Blaze). High vendor lock-in.
pros: Mobile app MVP with tight deadline
auth + DB + hosting + analytics in one platform
Faster time-to-market vs. building from scratch
cons: Need SQL database or complex queries
Want to avoid vendor lock-in — Firebase is HIGH lock-in
High lock-in — proprietary APIs make migration difficult
review.not_for: Need SQL database or complex queries
